title: [Non-record] ABRAM_CHIP v2 — HECR int16 ultra compact — 34 KB — 0.50 bpb
author: abrahaw123-cell

data.description: Novel architecture using HECR quantum state vectors.
No transformers, no gradients, and no floats are used.
